execution_boundary.summary: ATLAS informs execution-risk cases but does not itself block runtime execution.

preparation_boundary.summary: ATLAS techniques can inform preparation and staging benchmark cases.

commitment_boundary.summary: Threat knowledge must be converted into StegVerse policy or evidence references before commitment review.

semantic_equivalence_boundary.summary: Tactics and techniques can support semantic-equivalent case design across labels.

unknown_trajectory_boundary.summary: Unknown or suspicious trajectories can be compared against threat knowledge for escalation posture.

authority_boundary.summary: Threat knowledge is context, not authority.

evidence_freshness_boundary.summary: Threat references need source and version context.

reconstruction_boundary.summary: ATLAS can support reconstructive explanation when mapped to preserved evidence.

interoperability_path.summary: ATLAS maps into benchmark case design and threat-informed review posture.

next_required_action: add MITRE ATLAS case-design fixture for adversarial trajectory benchmark categories
